title: acalypha chuniana
intro: Acalypha chuniana, also known as the Chinese copperleaf or copper bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headache and joint pain, and supporting the immune system. Acalypha chuniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and other remedies.
